query:
SELECT pv.id as variantId, pv.variantCode, pv.isDefault, vp.sellingPriceFobL1, vp.sellingPriceFobL2, vp.sellingPriceFobL3 
FROM product_variants pv 
LEFT JOIN variant_pricing vp ON pv.id = vp.variantId 
WHERE pv.productId = (SELECT id FROM products WHERE sku = 'CV-1000') 
LIMIT 5;
